title: Talli
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Talli''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. She and [[Rand (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Rand'']] were part of [[Operation Grain Snatch]], in which their role was to swap the fresh [[Grain/Legends|grain]] belonging to the convoy with their [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] grain. The operation was a success.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
